scenario.key_phrase: I'm just looking at options for now

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! This is Priya from PhysicsWallah. I understand you showed interest in our JEE courses. May I know your good name please?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hi... uh, Saurabh. I'm from Kota.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great Saurabh! Kota - the coaching hub! So which class are you currently in? And are you preparing for JEE specifically?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in 10th right now. Haan, JEE Main ke liye soch raha hun. But I'm just looking at options for now.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect timing! Class 10 se start karna is actually ideal for JEE preparation. So you'll be appearing for JEE in 2027, right? That gives you good 2+ years to prepare properly.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yeah, 2027. But there are so many coaching options here in Kota already... why should I consider online?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul valid question! See, our JEE Lakshya 2027 batch combines the best of both - Kota level teaching quality but at much more affordable rates. Plus you get recorded lectures, so revision becomes easy. Have you checked any pricing for offline coaching there?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Offline coaching is quite expensive here... around 1.5-2 lakhs easily. What's your pricing like?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Exactly my point! Our JEE Lakshya 2027 is just ₹35,999 for the complete 2-year program. That's almost 4-5 times cheaper! And we offer 0% EMI at just ₹3,499 per month through PW Pay - that's less than what most families spend on daily chai!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That does sound reasonable... but I'll need to discuss with my parents first. Can you call back later?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! Family decision hai, I totally understand. When would be a good time to call back? And should I speak directly with your parents as well to explain the course structure?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Maybe tomorrow evening around 7 PM? And yes, you can talk to my father if needed. He handles these decisions mostly.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll call tomorrow at 7 PM sharp. Meanwhile, I'll send you a detailed brochure on WhatsApp. What's your number? And Saurabh, any specific subjects you're particularly worried about for JEE?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: It's 98765-43210. Physics and Maths are okay, but Chemistry seems tough. Will your course cover everything from basics?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely! Our Lakshya batch starts from NCERT basics and gradually builds up to JEE Advanced level. Chemistry ke liye Alakh Sir's teaching method is amazing - students say it becomes their favorite subject! I'll share some demo videos too.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay, sounds good. I'll check the videos and discuss with parents. Talk tomorrow then.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect Saurabh! I'll send everything on WhatsApp in 10 minutes. Tomorrow 7 PM confirmed. Have a great day and all the best for your JEE journey! Take care!
